sourceSummary.oneLine: Samsung Electronics part approval/specification package for MI60-01062A SPACER-PCB_2G BOARD used with 2G DETECTOR.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Defines approval information, EC history, control plan, inspection criteria, environmental substance requirements, and packaging information for the part.
keyPoints: Document code and SEC part number are MI60-01062A.
Revision 01 dated 2019-07-09 changed thickness from 1T to 1.2T.
Key specifications include outside diameter 8±0.2, inside diameter 4.2±0.05, and thickness 1.2±0.05.
Comments require compliance with threshold substances specified in 0QA-2049 and prohibit substances specified in 00Q2-0083K.
Vendor/manufacturer is 대일정공 / Daeil Precision Industry.

entities.name: Samsung Electronics Co.
entities.evidence: This is the asset of Samsung Electronics Co. and it is prohibited from copying and application without permission.

entities.name: Health&Medical Mechanical DR R&D Group
entities.evidence: PROPOSAL DIVISION: Health&Medical Mechanical DR R&D Group

concepts.name: Environmental controlled substances
concepts.evidence: Comply with the threshold of substances which are specified in 0QA-2049

concepts.name: Prohibited substances
concepts.evidence: This parts should not contain any substances which are specified in 00Q2-0083K

evidence.claim: The document code for the part package is MI60-01062A.
The part description is SPACER-PCB_2G BOARD.
The model listed for the part is 2G DETECTOR.
Revision 01 changed the thickness from 1T to 1.2T.
The inside diameter specification is CTF1 and 4.2±0.05.
The thickness specification is CTF2 and 1.2±0.05.
The part must comply with threshold substances specified in 0QA-2049.

reviewFlags.reason: No external regulatory authority or jurisdiction is identified; Samsung Electronics Co. is listed only as the asset owner/source organization.
